news.headline: Purvah Green inks PPA with SECI for 250 MW wind project
news.summary: Purvah Green, a subsidiary of Calcutta Electric Supply Corporation (CESC), has inked a power purchase agreement (PPA) with the Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI) for a 250 MW wind project. The capacity was

news.headline: PSEI sells minority stake in 240 MW Big Sky Wind project
news.summary: Power Sustainable Energy Infrastructure (PSEI) has sold a 49.9 per cent stake in the Big Sky Wind project to funds managed by Hamilton Lane and GCM Grosvenor. The project, with a capacity of 240 MW,
